pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your site.
pricing.tooltip: Plans are billed monthly or yearly. Upgrade anytime from this dashboard.
pricing.downgradeTooltip: To downgrade, manage your subscription in Wix account settings.
howTo.title: How to Use
howTo.subtitle: Get your PDF live on your site in a few minutes.
faq.a1: Any publicly accessible https URL that serves a PDF file. The URL should end in .pdf or return a PDF content type. Google Drive and Dropbox share links work if set to public.
faq.q2: How do I add the widget to my site?
faq.a2: Open the Wix Editor, click Add Elements, search for PDF Viewer & Flipbook, and drag the widget onto your page. The widget is added automatically on install, or you can place it manually.
faq.q3: Why can I only see 5 pages on the free plan?
faq.a3: The free plan previews the first 5 pages so visitors get a taste of your document. Upgrade to Premium to show the full PDF without limits.
faq.a4: Downloads are a Premium feature. Enable Allow Download in the Manage tab after upgrading.
faq.q5: The PDF does not load in the editor preview
faq.a5: The Wix editor sandbox may block PDF rendering. Publish your site or use the dashboard Live Preview to verify your URL. The live site works normally.
faq.q6: How do I remove the watermark?
faq.a6: Upgrade to Premium from the Plan & Settings tab. The Powered by PURPLE watermark is removed automatically on premium plans.
